title: SCP-131, The Eye Pods
description: Cute little eye pods that will stare at you
body:
The Eye Pods adds a new creature. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-131 also known as Eye Pods. 


These small, friendly creatures can spawn in groups, and are not hostile. There are four different color variants of SCP-131, but they share one common trait, their large, watchful eyes. Though SCP-131 is non-aggressive, it can be picked up and carried. They will watch the player with their large eyes, which could give you a sense of being constantly observed. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-131 spawn?

SCP-131 can spawn mostly in groups anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster. However, there can only be one instance of SCP-131.

► Does SCP-131 Mod work with SCP-173 Mod?

Yes! Since version 1.2 the SCP-131 mod works with the SCP-173 mod.

</details>



![SCP-131](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9839f7cb666200562709e798722d13d9bdab3bc8.png)

SCP-131 are small, drop-shaped creatures with a large eye. They are friendly and come in red, yellow, green, and blue. SCP-131 often spawn in groups, and they enjoy watching players and running around. They are quick and will flee if attacked. You can pick them up and place them again. A special benefit of SCP-131 is that SCP-173 within a 10-block radius will freeze, unable to move or attack. However, SCP-131 will also be immobile in this state.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
